ListItem.Para: Valve is deactivated closed.
Aft equipment cooling supply fan smoke detector operates normally.
For ground operations at OAT 30 degrees C or higher, both packs are selected on or conditioned air is supplied to the airplane.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the aft cargo heat valve closed (AMM DDG 21-27-28).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
AFT CARGO HEAT VLV OPEN
AFT CARGO HEAT VLV CLOSE
Gain access to aft cargo heat valve.
Turn the open/close knob until the valve is fully closed.

OperationNote.Para: Aft cargo compartment heat is not available. Temperature sensitive cargo should not be carried in the aft cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details

ListItem.Para: Valve is deactivated closed.
Aft cargo heater is deactivated.
Aft equipment cooling supply fan smoke detector operates normally.
For ground operations at OAT 30 degrees C or higher, both packs are selected on or conditioned air is supplied to the airplane.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the aft cargo heat valve closed and deactivate the aft cargo heater (AMM DDG 21-27-28).

ListItem.Para: Deactivate the aft cargo heat valve closed.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
AFT CARGO HEAT VLV OPEN
AFT CARGO HEAT VLV CLOSE
Gain access to aft cargo heat valve.
Turn the open/close knob until the valve is fully closed.
Deactivate the aft cargo heater.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
HEATER-AFT CARGO-ELEMENT 1
HEATER-AFT CARGO-ELEMENT 2

Note.Para: The CARGO AFT HEATER status message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Gain access to the inoperative aft cargo heater.
Disconnect, cap and stow the electrical connector to the inoperative aft cargo heater.

OperationNote.Para: Aft cargo compartment heat is not available. Temperature sensitive cargo should not be carried in the aft cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details
